## SK Hynix Nasdaq ADR Listing Named a Key Market Event to Watch This Week by WSJ

WSJ placement of the SK Hynix ADR alongside a major macro earnings event signals the listing has crossed into broad investor awareness; heightened attention could amplify price discovery in both the ADR and the underlying KRX shares around the debut.

- The Wall Street Journal flagged SK Hynix's Nasdaq ADR listing as one of the notable events to monitor alongside PepsiCo earnings.
- Mainstream financial press coverage elevates the listing's visibility beyond specialist semiconductor media.
- No pricing terms, listing size, or ADR ratio details are provided in the headline.
- PepsiCo earnings are co-mentioned but are not a watchlist name.
